seoTitle: Send Bulk Emails on HubSpot: Mass Mail Guide
metaDescription: Send mass email campaigns in HubSpot by building segmented lists, choosing a template, and scheduling delivery while checking deliverability.
intro: Sending bulk email in HubSpot starts with building a clean, segmented list rather than blasting your entire database at once. This guide covers filtering contacts before you compose, choosing a scalable template, and configuring sender settings so your messages don't trigger spam filters. It ends with running a deliverability check before the final send.

steps.heading: Open the Email dashboard
steps.body: Go to Marketing, then click into the Email directory.

steps.heading: Build your recipient list
steps.body: Use the Lists tool to filter and compile a clean contact segment before composing your message.

steps.heading: Choose a template
steps.body: Pick a scalable baseline theme or block layout inside the drag-and-drop content builder.

steps.heading: Configure sender settings
steps.body: Set your custom from-name and verified reply-to address so recipients know the email is legitimate.

steps.heading: Assign lists and exclusions
steps.body: Go to the Send or Schedule tab to apply your target recipient lists and exclude opt-out groups.

steps.heading: Test and send
steps.body: Send a live test to check deliverability and formatting, then click Send to deploy the campaign.

faq.question: Do I need to build a list before sending bulk emails?
faq.answer: Yes, filtering and compiling a clean contact segment first helps ensure you're only messaging relevant, opted-in recipients.

faq.question: How do I avoid spam filters when sending mass emails?
faq.answer: Using verified sender addresses and running a deliverability check before sending helps improve inbox placement.

faq.question: Can I exclude certain contacts from a bulk send?
faq.answer: Yes, the Send or Schedule tab lets you suppress specific contacts or groups from receiving the campaign.

faq.question: Is there a limit to how many contacts I can email at once?
faq.answer: Limits depend on your HubSpot plan and marketing contact tier, so it's worth checking your account settings.
